policy: paper-trading validation is a shadow gate; profile support can prioritize recipes but cannot promote confidence impact without direct PIT paper-trading evidence
pre_registration_policy: each recipe has a deterministic experiment id and pre-registration hash before any outcome metrics are evaluated
